---
title: "Figure 7 (SIM, macro_IR) — parameter distortion + residual calibration over (N_ch, noise), by interval"
author: "Luciano Moffatt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

<!--
Transpose of figure_7_sim_by_Nch (battery_sim_G, bootstrap over 10000 sims). Plane = (N_ch x noise); facet columns
= interval Delta*k_off. Four blocks: A = parameter sample distortion, B = parameter correlation distortion (both
5 param rows, null 1), C = r-bar^2 (Sum_r2_std/n, null 1, same distortion key), D = r-bar (Sum_r_std/n, null 0,
signed key). n = 10/(Delta/tau). CI-aware fill: white == 95% bootstrap CI brackets the null, colour == significant.
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(tidyverse); library(patchwork)
```

```{r params}
NOISES   <- c("0.05", "0.1", "0.2", "0.5", "1", "10")
PIDX     <- c(on = 0, off = 1, unitary_current = 2, Current_Noise = 3, Num_ch_mean = 5)
PARAM_LAB<- c(on = "log[10]~k[on]", off = "log[10]~k[off]", unitary_current = "log[10]~i",
              Current_Noise = "log[10]~sigma[noise]", Num_ch_mean = "log[10]~N[ch]")
COMPS    <- c(sample = "Probit_statistics_Gaussian_Sample_Distortion",
              corr   = "Probit_statistics_Likelihood_Correlation_Distortion")
R2_COMP  <- "Probit_statistics_Moment_statistics_Sum_r2_std"
R1_COMP  <- "Probit_statistics_Moment_statistics_Sum_r_std"
AC_COMP  <- "Probit_statistics_Report_integral_r_std"   # integrated autocorrelation lag (null 1), proxy for r_std autocorr

RAMP <- c("#021024","#053061","#2166AC","#4393C3","#92C5DE","#D1E5F0","#F7F7F7",
          "#FDDBC7","#F4A582","#D6604D","#B2182B","#67001F","#3d0011")
bandcols <- function(breaks) {
  n <- length(breaks) - 1; ctr <- findInterval(0, breaks); nb <- ctr - 1; nr <- n - ctr; K <- max(nb, nr, 1)
  blue <- colorRampPalette(rev(RAMP[1:7]), space = "Lab")(K + 1)
  red  <- colorRampPalette(RAMP[7:13],     space = "Lab")(K + 1)
  cols <- rep(RAMP[7], n)
  if (nb > 0) cols[seq(ctr - 1, 1)] <- blue[2:(nb + 1)]
  if (nr > 0) cols[seq(ctr + 1, n)] <- red[2:(nr + 1)]
  cols
}
fmt_big <- function(x) ifelse(is.infinite(x), "infinity",
             ifelse(x >= 1000, paste0("10^", round(log10(x))), formatC(x, format = "g", digits = 3)))

DIST_LIN    <- c(0.5, 0.67, 0.8, 0.87, 0.91, 0.94, 0.97, 0.99, 1.01, 1.03, 1.06, 1.1, 1.15, 1.25, 1.5, 1.7, 2.5)
DIST_BREAKS <- log10(DIST_LIN)
DIST_PAL    <- bandcols(DIST_BREAKS)
DIST_LAB    <- fmt_big(DIST_LIN)
bandcols_at <- function(breaks, at) {   # like bandcols but the white band is centred on an arbitrary null 'at'
  n <- length(breaks) - 1; ctr <- findInterval(at, breaks); nb <- ctr - 1; nr <- n - ctr; K <- max(nb, nr, 1)
  blue <- colorRampPalette(rev(RAMP[1:7]), space = "Lab")(K + 1)
  red  <- colorRampPalette(RAMP[7:13],     space = "Lab")(K + 1)
  cols <- rep(RAMP[7], n)
  if (nb > 0) cols[seq(ctr - 1, 1)] <- blue[2:(nb + 1)]
  if (nr > 0) cols[seq(ctr + 1, n)] <- red[2:(nr + 1)]
  cols
}
# Dedicated scales: band step = ROUND(median bootstrap CI width) so one colour step ~ one CI. Null omitted from the
# breaks -> a white band straddles it. r_std CI .0042 -> step .005 (null 0); r_std^2 CI .0058 -> .005 (null 1);
# tau_int CI .024 -> .025 (null 1, tau_int >= 1 floor: one-sided, red only).
R1_BREAKS <- {b <- seq(-0.025, 0.025, 0.005); b[abs(b) > 1e-9]}   # null 0, two-sided
R2_BREAKS <- c(seq(0.940, 0.995, 0.005), 1.005, 1.010)            # null 1, two-sided
AC_BREAKS <- c(0.975, 1.025, 1.050, 1.075, 1.100)                 # null 1, tau_int >= 1: white at 1, red only
R1_PAL <- bandcols_at(R1_BREAKS, 0); R2_PAL <- bandcols_at(R2_BREAKS, 1); AC_PAL <- bandcols_at(AC_BREAKS, 1)
lab_mult <- function(b, m) ifelse(abs(b / m - round(b / m)) < 1e-6, formatC(b, format = "g"), "")
R1_LAB <- formatC(R1_BREAKS, format = "g"); R2_LAB <- lab_mult(R2_BREAKS, 0.01); AC_LAB <- formatC(AC_BREAKS, format = "g")
```

```{r data}
read_noise <- function(z) map_dfr(Sys.glob(sprintf(
  "../data/1c2ae6f/figure_3_G_nch_*_nsim_10000_macro_IR_noise_%s_battery_sim_G.csv", z)),
  ~ read.csv(.x, skip = 1, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)) %>% mutate(noise = z)
raw <- map_dfr(NOISES, read_noise)

ivf_fct <- function(iv) factor(paste("interval", iv), levels = paste("interval", sort(unique(iv), decreasing = TRUE)))

stat <- raw %>%
  filter(component_path %in% COMPS, param_index == param_col, param_index %in% PIDX,
         statistic == "value", probit %in% c("mean", "quantile")) %>%
  mutate(comp = names(COMPS)[match(component_path, COMPS)],
         key = case_when(probit == "mean" ~ "m", quantile_level == 0.025 ~ "lo",
                         quantile_level == 0.975 ~ "hi", TRUE ~ NA_character_)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(key)) %>%
  group_by(comp, noise, Num_ch, interval_in_tau, param_index, key) %>%
  summarise(v = mean(value), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = key, values_from = v) %>%
  mutate(Dconf = ifelse(m > 1, pmax(1, lo), pmin(1, hi)),
         lx = log10(Num_ch), ly = log10(as.numeric(noise)),
         z = pmin(pmax(log10(Dconf), min(DIST_BREAKS)), max(DIST_BREAKS)),
         param = factor(names(PIDX)[match(param_index, PIDX)], levels = names(PIDX), labels = unname(PARAM_LAB)),
         ivf   = ivf_fct(interval_in_tau))

scalar <- function(comp, stat_name, nullv, divide, rlab_parsed) {
  d <- raw %>%
    filter(component_path == comp, statistic == stat_name, probit %in% c("mean", "quantile")) %>%
    mutate(key = case_when(probit == "mean" ~ "m", quantile_level == 0.025 ~ "lo",
                           quantile_level == 0.975 ~ "hi", TRUE ~ NA_character_)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(key)) %>%
    group_by(noise, Num_ch, interval_in_tau, key) %>%
    summarise(v = mean(value), .groups = "drop")
  if (divide) d <- mutate(d, v = v / (10 / interval_in_tau))
  d %>% pivot_wider(names_from = key, values_from = v) %>%
    mutate(Dconf = ifelse(m > nullv, pmax(nullv, lo), pmin(nullv, hi)),
           lx = log10(Num_ch), ly = log10(as.numeric(noise)),
           ivf = ivf_fct(interval_in_tau), rlab = rlab_parsed)
}
s_r2 <- scalar(R2_COMP, "mean", 1, TRUE, "bar(r)^2") %>%
  mutate(z = pmin(pmax(Dconf, min(R2_BREAKS)), max(R2_BREAKS)))
s_ac <- scalar(AC_COMP, "integral_correlation_lag", 1, FALSE, "tau[int]") %>%
  mutate(z = pmin(pmax(Dconf, min(AC_BREAKS)), max(AC_BREAKS)))
s_r1 <- scalar(R1_COMP, "mean", 0, TRUE, "bar(r)") %>%
  mutate(z = pmin(pmax(Dconf, min(R1_BREAKS)), max(R1_BREAKS)))
```

```{r plot, fig.width = 17, fig.height = 18}
X_BRK <- log10(c(10, 100, 1000, 10000)); Y_BRK <- log10(c(.1, 1, 10))
base_theme <- theme_bw(base_size = 9, base_family = "Helvetica") +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), panel.spacing = unit(0.15, "cm"), legend.position = "none",
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6, angle = 45, hjust = 1), axis.text.y = element_text(size = 6.5),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 8.5), strip.text = element_text(size = 8),
        plot.tag = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"))

block_dist <- function(which_comp, tag) {
  ggplot(filter(stat, comp == which_comp), aes(lx, ly, z = z)) +
    geom_contour_filled(breaks = DIST_BREAKS) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = DIST_PAL, drop = FALSE, guide = "none") +
    geom_contour(breaks = c(log10(1/1.5),  log10(1.5)),  colour = "grey30", linewidth = .25, linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_contour(breaks = c(log10(1/1.15), log10(1.15)), colour = "black",  linewidth = .3) +
    geom_point(size = .1, colour = "grey35", alpha = .4) +
    facet_grid(param ~ ivf, labeller = labeller(param = label_parsed)) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = X_BRK, labels = c("10","100","1000","10000")) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = Y_BRK, labels = c(".1","1","10")) +
    labs(x = expression(N[ch]), y = "noise", tag = tag) + base_theme
}
block_scalar <- function(df, breaks, pal, tag) {
  ggplot(df, aes(lx, ly, z = z)) +
    geom_contour_filled(breaks = breaks) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = pal, drop = FALSE, guide = "none") +
    geom_point(size = .1, colour = "grey35", alpha = .4) +
    facet_grid(rlab ~ ivf, labeller = labeller(rlab = label_parsed)) +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = X_BRK, labels = c("10","100","1000","10000")) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = Y_BRK, labels = c(".1","1","10")) +
    labs(x = expression(N[ch]), y = "noise", tag = tag) + base_theme
}
colorbar <- function(pal, edge_lab, title, lin, sol = numeric(0), dsh = numeric(0), parse_lab = TRUE) {
  n <- length(pal); pos <- function(v) match(v, lin) - 0.5
  marks <- c(
    if (length(dsh)) list(annotate("segment", x = pos(dsh), xend = pos(dsh), y = 0.5, yend = 2.0,
                                   colour = "grey25", linewidth = .35, linetype = "dashed")),
    if (length(sol)) list(annotate("segment", x = pos(sol), xend = pos(sol), y = 0.5, yend = 2.0,
                                   colour = "black", linewidth = .5)))
  ggplot(data.frame(x = seq_len(n)), aes(x, 1, fill = factor(x))) +
    geom_tile(colour = "grey92", linewidth = .15) + marks +
    scale_fill_manual(values = pal, guide = "none") +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0.5, n + 0.5, 1),
                       labels = if (parse_lab) parse(text = edge_lab) else edge_lab, expand = c(0, 0)) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0.5, 2.0), clip = "off") +
    labs(y = title) + theme_void(base_family = "Helvetica") +
    theme(axis.title.y = element_text(angle = 0, size = 7.5, hjust = 1, vjust = .5, margin = margin(r = 4)),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 6), axis.ticks.x = element_line(colour = "grey55", linewidth = .3),
          axis.ticks.length.x = unit(2, "pt"), plot.margin = margin(5, 120, 3, 60))
}
cb_dist <- colorbar(DIST_PAL, DIST_LAB, "distortion", DIST_LIN, sol = c(0.87, 1.15), dsh = c(0.67, 1.5))
cb_r2 <- colorbar(R2_PAL, R2_LAB, "r_std^2 (null 1)", R2_BREAKS, parse_lab = FALSE)
cb_ac <- colorbar(AC_PAL, AC_LAB, "tau_int (null 1)", AC_BREAKS, parse_lab = FALSE)
cb_r1 <- colorbar(R1_PAL, R1_LAB, "mean r_std (null 0)", R1_BREAKS, parse_lab = FALSE)

g <- block_dist("sample", "A") / block_dist("corr", "B") / cb_dist /
     block_scalar(s_r2, R2_BREAKS, R2_PAL, "C") / cb_r2 /
     block_scalar(s_ac, AC_BREAKS, AC_PAL, "D") / cb_ac /
     block_scalar(s_r1, R1_BREAKS, R1_PAL, "E") / cb_r1 +
     plot_layout(heights = c(5, 5, 0.35, 1, 0.35, 1, 0.35, 1, 0.35))
g
ggsave("Figure_7_sim_by_interval.pdf", g, width = 17, height = 18)
```
